HMMERutils 0.99.0
  • Get started
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Perform a phmmer search of a protein sequence against a protein sequence database.

Source: R/search_phmmer.R
search_phmmer.Rd

Perform a phmmer search of a protein sequence against a protein sequence database.

search_phmmer(
  seqs,
  dbs = "swissprot",
  fullseqfasta = TRUE,
  verbose = TRUE,
  timeout = 90,
  alignment = FALSE
)

Arguments

seqs

A vector of characters containing the sequences of the query.

dbs

A character vector containing the target databases. Frequently used databases are swissprot, uniprotrefprot, uniprotkb, ensembl, pdb and alphafold, but a complete and updated list is available at https://www.ebi.ac.uk/Tools/hmmer/.

fullseqfasta

A logical, if TRUE full sequence fasta will be downloaded as a AAStringSet. Package Biostrings must be installed in that case.

verbose

A logical, if TRUE details of the download process is printed.

timeout

An integer specifying the number of seconds to wait for the reply before a time out occurs.

alignment

A logical, if TRUE sequence alignment will be downloaded as a AAMultipleAlignment. Package Biostrings must be installed in that case.

Value

A nested DataFrame with columns seqs, dbs, url(HMMER temporary url), hits, stats, domains and, if selected, fullseq.fasta. and alignment.

Examples

# \donttest{
phmmer_tbl <- search_phmmer(
    seqs = "MTEITAAMVKELRTGAGMMDCKN",
    dbs = "pdb",
    verbose = FALSE,
    timeout = 90
)
#> Content from HMMER server:
#> <opt>
#>   <data name="results" algo="phmmer" uuid="4FACD568-B838-11EC-B532-52D353F04F9B">
#>     <_internal highevalue="4.5e-05" lowevalue="0.00024" />
#>     <hits name="4r71_A" acc="4r71_A" arch="PF00889.22 PF00009.30 PF03144.28 PF03143.20" archScore="5" archindex="118498722050600 83333" bias="0.3" desc="Elongation factor Ts, Elongation factor Tu" evalue="4.5e-05" extlink="https://www.ebi.ac.uk/pdbe/entry/pdb/4r71_A" flags="3" kg="Bacteria" ndom="2" nincluded="1" niseqs="16" nregions="2" nreported="1" ph="Proteobacteria" pvalue="-23.2208827146136" score="26.0" sindex="57510549" species="Escherichia coli K-12" taxid="83333" taxlink="http://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/Taxonomy/Browser/wwwtax.cgi?mode=Info&amp;id=">
#>       <domains aliId="0.863636363636364" aliIdCount="19" aliL="694" aliM="23" aliN="24" aliSim="0.954545454545455" aliSimCount="21" aliaseq="MAEITASLVKELRerTGAGMMDCK" alicsline="" alihmmacc="" alihmmdesc="" alihmmfrom="1" alihmmname="&gt;Query" alihmmto="22" alimline="m eita++vkelr  tgagmmdck" alimmline="" alimodel="mteitaamvkelr..tgagmmdck" aliniseqs="2" alintseq="" alippline="78*********95449*******9" alirfline="" alisindex="57510549" alisqacc="4r71_A" alisqdesc="Elongation factor Ts, Elongation factor Tu" alisqfrom="1" alisqname="4r71_A" alisqto="24" bias="0.12" bitscore="21.6458969116211" cevalue="2.0e-08" iali="1" ienv="1" ievalue="0.0016" is_included="1" is_reported="1" jali="24" jenv="25" oasc="0.88" />
#>       <domains aliId="0.538461538461538" aliIdCount="7" aliL="694" aliM="23" aliN="13" aliSim="0.769230769230769" aliSimCount="10" aliaseq="YVKNMITGAAQMD" alicsline="" alihmmacc="" alihmmdesc="" alihmmfrom="8" alihmmname="&gt;Query" alihmmto="20" alimline=" vk + tga++md" alimmline="" alimodel="mvkelrtgagmmd" aliniseqs="2" alintseq="" alippline="69999*****999" alirfline="" alisindex="57510549" alisqacc="4r71_A" alisqdesc="Elongation factor Ts, Elongation factor Tu" alisqfrom="372" alisqname="4r71_A" alisqto="384" bias="0.01" bitscore="-0.108042255043983" cevalue="1.1" iali="372" ienv="369" ievalue="88000" is_included="0" is_reported="0" jali="384" jenv="386" oasc="0.85" />
#>       <pdbs>4r71_C</pdbs>
#>       <pdbs>4r71_A</pdbs>
#>       <seqs an="" de="Elongation factor Ts, Elongation factor Tu" dn="4r71_C" sp="Escherichia coli K-12" />
#>     </hits>
#>     <hits name="3mmp_A" acc="3mmp_A" arch="PF00889.22 PF00009.30 PF03144.28 PF03143.20" archScore="5" archindex="118498722050600 83333" bias="0.3" desc="Elongation factor Tu 2, Elongation factor Ts" evalue="4.6e-05" extlink="https://www.ebi.ac.uk/pdbe/entry/pdb/3mmp_A" flags="3" kg="Bacteria" ndom="2" nincluded="1" niseqs="16" nregions="2" nreported="1" ph="Proteobacteria" pvalue="-23.2090006078344" score="26.0" sindex="57514389" species="Escherichia coli K-12" taxid="83333" taxlink="http://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/Taxonomy/Browser/wwwtax.cgi?mode=Info&amp;id=">
#>       <domains aliId="0.863636363636364" aliIdCount="19" aliL="678" aliM="23" aliN="24" aliSim="0.954545454545455" aliSimCount="21" aliaseq="MAEITASLVKELRerTGAGMMDCK" alicsline="" alihmmacc="" alihmmdesc="" alihmmfrom="1" alihmmname="&gt;Query" alihmmto="22" alimline="m eita++vkelr  tgagmmdck" alimmline="" alimodel="mteitaamvkelr..tgagmmdck" aliniseqs="2" alintseq="" alippline="78*********95449*******9" alirfline="" alisindex="57514389" alisqacc="3mmp_A" alisqdesc="Elongation factor Tu 2, Elongation factor Ts" alisqfrom="1" alisqname="3mmp_A" alisqto="24" bias="0.12" bitscore="21.6831684112549" cevalue="1.9e-08" iali="1" ienv="1" ievalue="0.0015" is_included="1" is_reported="1" jali="24" jenv="25" oasc="0.88" />
#>       <domains aliId="0.538461538461538" aliIdCount="7" aliL="678" aliM="23" aliN="13" aliSim="0.769230769230769" aliSimCount="10" aliaseq="YVKNMITGAAQMD" alicsline="" alihmmacc="" alihmmdesc="" alihmmfrom="8" alihmmname="&gt;Query" alihmmto="20" alimline=" vk + tga++md" alimmline="" alimodel="mvkelrtgagmmd" aliniseqs="2" alintseq="" alippline="69999*****999" alirfline="" alisindex="57514389" alisqacc="3mmp_A" alisqdesc="Elongation factor Tu 2, Elongation factor Ts" alisqfrom="372" alisqname="3mmp_A" alisqto="384" bias="0.01" bitscore="-0.072101317346096" cevalue="1.1" iali="372" ienv="369" ievalue="85000" is_included="0" is_reported="0" jali="384" jenv="386" oasc="0.85" />
#>       <pdbs>3mmp_C</pdbs>
#>       <pdbs>3mmp_A</pdbs>
#>       <seqs an="" de="Elongation factor Tu 2, Elongation factor Ts" dn="3mmp_C" sp="Escherichia coli K-12" />
#>     </hits>
#>     <hits name="3agp_A" acc="3agp_A" arch="PF00889.22 PF00009.30 PF03144.28 PF03143.20 PF03431.16" archScore="5" archindex="127492375402814 39803" bias="0.3" desc="Elongation factor Ts, Elongation factor Tu, LINKER, Q beta replicase" evalue="0.00022" extlink="https://www.ebi.ac.uk/pdbe/entry/pdb/3agp_A" flags="3" kg="Viruses" ndom="2" nincluded="1" niseqs="16" nregions="2" nreported="1" ph="Lenarviricota" pvalue="-21.6279498013415" score="24.0" sindex="2984797" species="Escherichia virus Qbeta" taxid="39803" taxlink="http://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/Taxonomy/Browser/wwwtax.cgi?mode=Info&amp;id=">
#>       <domains aliId="0.863636363636364" aliIdCount="19" aliL="1289" aliM="23" aliN="24" aliSim="0.954545454545455" aliSimCount="21" aliaseq="MAEITASLVKELRerTGAGMMDCK" alicsline="" alihmmacc="" alihmmdesc="" alihmmfrom="1" alihmmname="&gt;Query" alihmmto="22" alimline="m eita++vkelr  tgagmmdck" alimmline="" alimodel="mteitaamvkelr..tgagmmdck" aliniseqs="11" alintseq="" alippline="78*********95449*******9" alirfline="" alisindex="2984797" alisqacc="3agp_A" alisqdesc="Elongation factor Ts, Elongation factor Tu, LINKER, Q beta replicase" alisqfrom="1" alisqname="3agp_A" alisqto="24" bias="0.12" bitscore="20.6825752258301" cevalue="4.4e-08" iali="1" ienv="1" ievalue="0.0035" is_included="1" is_reported="1" jali="24" jenv="25" oasc="0.88" />
#>       <domains aliId="0.538461538461538" aliIdCount="7" aliL="1289" aliM="23" aliN="13" aliSim="0.769230769230769" aliSimCount="10" aliaseq="YVKNMITGAAQMD" alicsline="" alihmmacc="" alihmmdesc="" alihmmfrom="8" alihmmname="&gt;Query" alihmmto="20" alimline=" vk + tga++md" alimmline="" alimodel="mvkelrtgagmmd" aliniseqs="11" alintseq="" alippline="69999*****999" alirfline="" alisindex="2984797" alisqacc="3agp_A" alisqdesc="Elongation factor Ts, Elongation factor Tu, LINKER, Q beta replicase" alisqfrom="372" alisqname="3agp_A" alisqto="384" bias="0.01" bitscore="-1.04538345336914" cevalue="2.4" iali="372" ienv="369" ievalue="190000" is_included="0" is_reported="0" jali="384" jenv="386" oasc="0.85" />

#>     <hits name="4pc3_C" acc="4pc3_C" arch="PF00889.22" archScore="2" archindex="158710124293725 83333" bias="0.1" desc="Elongation factor Ts" evalue="0.00024" extlink="https://www.ebi.ac.uk/pdbe/entry/pdb/4pc3_C" flags="3" kg="Bacteria" ndom="1" nincluded="1" niseqs="16" nregions="1" nreported="1" ph="Proteobacteria" pvalue="-21.5357512234849" score="23.9" sindex="57516019" species="Escherichia coli K-12" taxid="83333" taxlink="http://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/Taxonomy/Browser/wwwtax.cgi?mode=Info&amp;id=">

#>     </hits>
#>     <hits name="4pc6_C" acc="4pc6_C" arch="PF00889.22" archScore="2" archindex="158710124293725 536056" bias="0.1" desc="Elongation factor Ts" evalue="0.00024" extlink="https://www.ebi.ac.uk/pdbe/entry/pdb/4pc6_C" flags="3" kg="Bacteria" ndom="1" nincluded="1" niseqs="16" nregions="1" nreported="1" ph="Proteobacteria" pvalue="-21.5357512234849" score="23.9" sindex="55721010" species="Escherichia coli (strain ATCC 33849 / DSM 4235 / NCIMB 12045 / K12 / DH1)" taxid="536056" taxlink="http://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/Taxonomy/Browser/wwwtax.cgi?mode=Info&amp;id=">
#>       <domains aliId="0.9" aliIdCount="18" aliL="282" aliM="23" aliN="22" aliSim="1" aliSimCount="20" aliaseq="EITASLVKELRerTGAGMMDCK" alicsline="" alihmmacc="" alihmmdesc="" alihmmfrom="3" alihmmname="&gt;Query" alihmmto="22" alimline="eita++vkelr  tgagmmdck" alimmline="" alimodel="eitaamvkelr..tgagmmdck" aliniseqs="2" alintseq="" alippline="9********95449*******9" alirfline="" alisindex="55721010" alisqacc="4pc6_C" alisqdesc="Elongation factor Ts" alisqfrom="2" alisqname="4pc6_C" alisqto="23" bias="0.08" bitscore="21.5817775726318" cevalue="2.1e-08" iali="2" ienv="1" ievalue="0.0017" is_included="1" is_reported="1" jali="23" jenv="24" oasc="0.88" />
#>       <pdbs>4pc6_D</pdbs>
#>       <pdbs>4pc6_C</pdbs>
#>       <seqs an="" de="Elongation factor Ts" dn="4pc6_D" sp="Escherichia coli DH1" />
#>     </hits>
#>     <stats Z="546676" Z_setby="0" domZ="7" domZ_setby="0" elapsed="0.02" n_past_bias="1847" n_past_fwd="7" n_past_msv="1960" n_past_vit="61" nhits="7" nincluded="7" nmodels="1" nreported="7" nseqs="546676" page="1" sys="0" total="1" unpacked="7" user="0" />
#>   </data>
#> </opt>
# }
